meaning: n.逾樊揀謾ｿ豐ｻ,逾樊帆,逾樊ｲｻ蝗ｽ
examples: Even now quasi - theocracy dies hard.
The theocracy equated rebellious thought and action with Satanic influence.
Many of the monasteries are closed, and much of the theocracy seems to have passed into history.
Even the Muslim Brothers look as if they will opt for civil society rather than theocracy.
He had replaced a tottering theocracy with a hereditary monarchy, though Buddhism remained the national faith.
